name: NexoWatt EOS admin UI v12

removes duplicate NexoWatt identity content from the horizontal nav rail and leaves only the collapse arrow
makes the NexoWatt EOS logo in the main header larger and more visible
keeps the v11 login centering and 404-safe asset handling
layout: full-width header + horizontal navigation rail + full-width content
